NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-24-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF TANYA HART-BEVERLY'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 9/12/05 IS CONTINUED TO 2/27/06 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. DISCOVERY ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: V.MU/D. LOK; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, CSR #3321 (206)
